headline: First Solar Weakens Guidance As Tariff Review Reshapes Production Plans
summary: First Solar, NasdaqGS:FSLR, issued weaker company guidance tied to planned underuse of its Southeast Asian factories. The company is limiting output as it assesses the effect of new tariffs on its production footprint. This shift highlights how potential tariff costs are feeding directly into near term operations and planning. For shareholders, the move comes as First Solar trades at $190.29, with the stock up 49.5% over the past year and 120.9% over five years, but showing a 30.6% decline...
